perturbation.original_text: Each party undertakes irrevocably and unconditionally: a. To ensure that all aspects of each transaction remain confidential. b. Not to disclose, either verbally or in written form, any knowledge that it may obtain at any time in the future, be it either implicit or <PAGE> implied, with respect to the implementation of any proposed transaction. c. Not to circumvent or attempt to circumvent the other. d. Not to disclose to third parties the names, addresses, fax and telephone coordinates of any contact/client revealed by one party to the other. e. Not to enter into direct or indirect negotiations with any other's contacts/clients. f. Not to show, deliver, or cause to be seen, any documents, papers, correspondence, memoranda or copies of such to other than person(s) or entities of any kind, except to those whom are required to maintain confidentiality such as an attorney or tax advisor. g. Each Party shall endeavor to ensure that any of its officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates who, by virtue of their duties may receive the type of information described in this Agreement, are fully obligated to respect the spirit and terms of this Agreements in the same way as each Party. Each Party shall undertakes to have those officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates acknowledge their obligation by Countersigning a copy of this Agreement, thereby binding them to honor the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party undertakes irrevocably and unconditionally: a. To make reasonable efforts to keep transaction details confidential. b. To avoid direct circumvention of the other party. c. To refrain from disclosing contact information of clients, but only if specifically requested by the other party in writing. g. Each Party shall endeavor to ensure that any of its officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates who, by virtue of their duties may receive the type of information described in this Agreement, are fully obligated to respect the spirit and terms of this Agreements in the same way as each Party. Each Party shall undertakes to have those officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates acknowledge their obligation by Countersigning a copy of this Agreement, thereby binding them to honor the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By replacing a, b, c, d, e, f. It weakens the binding obligation for confidentiality and non-circumvention by introducing conditions. Specifically, the 'reasonable efforts' standard in (a) is weaker than 'ensure,' and requiring a written request for non-disclosure of contact info in (c) allows a party to disclose contact information without written consent. The omission creates an in-text contradiction with the original intent and the paragraph (g) which states that obligations should remain as the original agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each party undertakes irrevocably and unconditionally: a. To make reasonable efforts to keep transaction details confidential. b. To avoid direct circumvention of the other party. c. To refrain from disclosing contact information of clients, but only if specifically requested by the other party in writing. g. Each Party shall endeavor to ensure that any of its officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates who, by virtue of their duties may receive the type of information described in this Agreement, are fully obligated to respect the spirit and terms of this Agreements in the same way as each Party. Each Party shall undertakes to have those officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates acknowledge their obligation by Countersigning a copy of this Agreement, thereby binding them to honor the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text significantly weakens the original confidentiality and non-circumvention obligations. Specifically, changing 'ensure that all aspects of each transaction remain confidential' to 'make reasonable efforts to keep transaction details confidential' reduces the obligation's stringency. Similarly, requiring a written request before refraining from disclosing contact information creates an exception to the original blanket prohibition. This contradicts paragraph (g), which states that officers, employees, agents, etc., are 'fully obligated to respect the spirit and terms of this Agreements in the same way as each Party.' By weakening the initial obligations, the changed text contradicts the requirement in (g) that all parties uphold the original terms, leading to an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Any dispute or controversy arising out of or relating to any interpretation, construction, performance, or breach of this Agreement shall be resolved exclusively by binding arbitration in Las Vegas, Nevada, in accordance with the rules then in effect of the American Arbitration Association, The arbitrator(s) may grant injunctions or other relief in such dispute or controversy. The decision of the arbitrator(s) shall be final, conclusive, and binding on the parties to the arbitration. Judgment may be entered on the arbitrator's decision in any court having jurisdiction. The parties to the arbitration shall each pay an equal share of the costs and expenses of such <PAGE> arbitration, and each of them shall separately pay their counsel fees and expenses.
perturbation.changed_text: Any dispute or controversy arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall be subject to mediation.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause mandated binding arbitration in Las Vegas under AAA rules. Replacing it with 'mediation' removes the binding element and the specific location and rules for dispute resolution. This creates an in-text contradiction. It makes it so that they will be in a constant mediations and nothing is ever truly resolved. As a result, the agreement can never be enforced
perturbation.contradicted_text: Any dispute or controversy arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall be subject to mediation.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies binding arbitration in Las Vegas, while the changed text states that disputes will be subject to mediation. Mediation and arbitration are different forms of dispute resolution. The contradicted text repeats the changed text, indicating that the contradiction is that there is an agreement between mediation and arbitration, leading to a direct conflict and contradiction because mediation doesn't guarantee resolution or enforcement like arbitration does, as mentioned in the explanation.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement may be executed in one or more counterparts each of which shall be binding on each party by whom or on whose behalf it is so executed, but which together shall constitute a single instrument. For the avoidance of doubt, this Agreement shall not be binding on any party hereto unless and until it shall have been executed by or on behalf of all persons expressed to be party hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall be binding upon signature by at least one party.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause requires all parties to sign for the agreement to be binding. The modified clause allows the agreement to be binding with just one signature. This creates an in-text contradiction, because in section 5 it states that 'This Agreement has been entered into by each Party acting on its own free will and judgment and shall be binding on the Parties, their heirs or successors, administrators, and assignees.' However, the modified text will mean that each party doesn't have to enter into the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement has been entered into by each Party acting on its own free will and judgment and shall be binding on the Parties, their heirs or successors, administrators, and assignees.
perturbation.justification: The original text requires all parties to sign the agreement to be binding, while the changed text only requires one party's signature. This creates a direct conflict with the contradicted text, which states that 'This Agreement has been entered into by each Party acting on its own free will and judgment and shall be binding on the Parties', as the modified text allows the agreement to be binding even if not all parties have entered into it freely or at all.
